errors.message: Vector retrieval configuration is missing, incompatible, or not approved.
errors.recoveryAction: Keep vector retrieval disabled and use the approved SQL-only path until configuration is evaluated and approved.

errors.message: The embedding dependency is unavailable.
errors.recoveryAction: Return an explicitly marked SQL-only result or retry only under the dependency retry budget.

errors.message: The optional reranker dependency is unavailable.
errors.recoveryAction: Continue without reranking only when the result provenance marks reranking disabled or unavailable.

errors.message: The derived vector index is unavailable.
errors.recoveryAction: Use SQL-only retrieval with degraded provenance; never substitute a fake or local JSON index.

errors.message: The derived vector index is older than the approved source snapshot boundary.
errors.recoveryAction: Exclude stale vector hits, use SQL-only retrieval, and rebuild the index from MySQL.

errors.message: The successful result used only authoritative SQL retrieval because vector capability was unavailable or stale.
errors.recoveryAction: Accept the result as degraded only when retrieval mode, reason, and provenance are present.

errors.message: The required target integration is unavailable or incompatible.
errors.recoveryAction: Install or upgrade the target integration, then rerun read-only contract verification.

errors.message: The runtime schema does not match the approved target contract.
errors.recoveryAction: Inspect the read-only schema diff and deploy a compatible provider contract.

errors.message: The request input is invalid for the approved contract.
errors.recoveryAction: Correct the reported input fields and submit a new validated request.

errors.message: The requested action is not allowed in the current workflow phase.
errors.recoveryAction: Refresh authoritative workflow state and continue only from an allowed transition.

errors.message: Explicit user confirmation is required before this action.
errors.recoveryAction: Obtain the required current-session confirmation before making a new call.

errors.message: The selected inquiry fields do not match the approved ordered columns.
errors.recoveryAction: Run field selection again and use its current ordered fields and items exactly.

errors.message: A required provider distribution reference is missing or empty.
errors.recoveryAction: Query provider state by stable correlation key and repair the reference before continuing.

errors.message: The authoritative server state does not allow request_recovery for this state version.
errors.recoveryAction: Refresh server state and create or reconcile the persisted recovery request before ingest.

errors.message: Recovery is already terminal with lifecycle status recovered or closed.
errors.recoveryAction: Treat the request as a no-op and do not invoke any recovery write.

errors.message: Canonical raw_messages_json conflicts with a supplied compatibility alias after normalization.
errors.recoveryAction: Submit one canonical raw_messages_json value or make every supplied alias normalize to the same value.

errors.message: The requirement or snapshot dictionary version and hash do not resolve to the approved dictionary.
errors.recoveryAction: Load the approved dictionary and rebuild the requirement or snapshot with its exact version and hash.

errors.message: A budget or rebate bound is missing, out of range, or ordered incorrectly.
errors.recoveryAction: Provide both approved bounds in canonical units with lower less than or equal to upper.

errors.message: One or more required deadlines are missing, timezone-ambiguous, or ordered incorrectly.
errors.recoveryAction: Clarify all three RFC3339 deadlines and preserve supplier response, client submission, then publication order.

errors.message: A requirement constraint does not match the approved closed-world grammar.
errors.recoveryAction: Replace the unknown field, operator, or expression shape with an approved constraint expression.

errors.message: A required authoritative join is missing, ambiguous, inactive, or not valid at the requested as-of time.
errors.recoveryAction: Reconcile the named authoritative records and retry only after every required join resolves exactly once.

errors.message: Joined records do not share the required tenant or project scope.
errors.recoveryAction: Use records from the same authoritative scope; do not copy identifiers across scopes.

errors.message: Late-arriving data cannot mutate a frozen snapshot or downstream artifact.
errors.recoveryAction: Retain lineage and route the record to the next snapshot or manual review without rewriting frozen results.

errors.message: An offer promotion conflicts with existing source lineage, scope, state, or idempotency ownership.
errors.recoveryAction: Query the promotion event and active offer revision; retry only if the source remains validated and unpromoted.

errors.message: The persisted field selection does not match the current requirement snapshot, dictionary, scope, or state version.
errors.recoveryAction: Refresh authoritative state and create a new selection result before any send operation.

errors.message: The authoritative phase, lifecycle status, response status, and allowed actions are not an approved state combination.
errors.recoveryAction: Block writes and repair or migrate the authoritative workflow state before continuing.

errors.message: Authoritative state changed while the requested transition was being applied.
errors.recoveryAction: Query or sync authoritative state; retry only if reconciliation shows the intended write is still valid.

errors.message: The outcome of the write is unknown and must not be retried directly.
errors.recoveryAction: Use the designated query or sync path to reconcile the write result before any new action.
